description_long: This is a medium-sized deciduous tree with a single, slender trunk that rises vertically before branching out into several main limbs. The branches support a rounded, moderately dense canopy of green, broad leaves, creating a lush and natural appearance. The trunk is textured and appears to be covered in rough, brownish bark, while the branches are thinner and more delicate. The foliage is abundant but not impenetrable, allowing some light to filter through the leaves and revealing occasional glimpses of the inner structure. The tree's overall form is slightly asymmetrical, with the canopy extending more to one side, giving it a natural, organic look. This type of tree is commonly found in urban parks, along sidewalks, or as a street tree, providing shade and greenery in city environments.
description: A medium-sized deciduous tree with a single trunk and a rounded, moderately dense canopy of green broad leaves. The tree has a natural, slightly asymmetrical form and rough bark.
description_view_0: The tree is seen with its trunk slightly angled and the canopy extending more to the right, showing a layered structure of branches and leaves.
description_view_1: This view highlights the tree's rounded canopy and reveals more of the trunk's vertical alignment, with foliage appearing fuller on the left side.
description_view_2: The tree is viewed almost head-on, with the trunk centered and the canopy appearing broad and evenly distributed, showing the density of the leaves.
description_view_3: The canopy appears most symmetrical from this angle, with the trunk straight and the foliage forming a nearly perfect oval shape.
